title: convolvulus aculeatus var. bona-nox
intro: Convolvulus aculeatus var. bona-nox, also known as bindweed or sleepy night, is a perennial plant with a history of use in traditional medicine. The plant is believed to have mild sedative properties, which can help with insomnia and restlessness. Convolvulus aculeatus var. bona-nox has been used to treat a range of health issues, including anxiety, insomnia, and restlessness, and is said to have a calming effect on the nervous system. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, and has also been used in traditional remedies for its potential medicinal properties.
